taxonomy: Vincentia flavicans is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. It is native to Western Australia. Vincentia flavicans is a shrub or small tree with yellow flowers. The classification of Vincentia flavicans is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Angiospermophyta, Class: Magnoliopsida, Order: Thymelaeales, Family: Thymelaeaceae, Genus: Vincentia, Species: V. flavicans. Further classification may be found at the species level.
